raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz fazzija wiꞥſch us Jo-
sawatu: Gribbi tu ar mannim
Karrâ eet prett Rahmotu eeſch
Gileadas? Un Josawats fazzija
us to Israêta Kehnizu: Es grib-
bu ta patt buht ka tu/ un man-
ni Landis/ ka tawi Laudis/ un
manni Sirgi/ ka tawi Sirgi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija Jesawats ne
to Israêta Kehnizu: Waiza jel-
le ſchodeen ta KUNGA Wahrdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Israêta Kehninsch
fapulzinaja tohs Praweeschns /
tſchetrfints Wihrus/ un fazzija
us teem: Buhs man us Rah-
motu eeſch Gileadas Karrâ eet/
jeb buhs man to pamest? Un tee
fazzija: Zellees/ jo tas KUNGS
dohs winnu ta Kehnina Rohkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Josawats fazzija:
Neggi ſcheitan irr wehl zits
Praweets ta KUNGA/ ka mehs
no ta warrefim waizahrt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Israêta Kehninsch
fazzija us Josawatu: Wehl
weens Wihrs irr/ zaur ko warr
to KUNGU waizahrt/ bet es ee-
nihstu winnu/ jo tas man ne
stahsta labbas Leetas/ bet tau-
nas ween/ Mikkus Jeimla Dehls.
Un Josawats fazzija: Lai tas
Kehninsch ta ne runna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atzinaja tas Israêta
Kehninsch weenu Kambar-Jun-
kuri/ un fazzija: Atwedd drihs
Mikku Jeimla Dehln.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Israêta Keh-
ninsch/ un Josawats tas Keh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ninsch no Juhda/ fehdesa ifkatr
us fawn Krehsliu ar fawahr
Drehbehin apgehrbti/ us t
Plahnu preeſch Samartja
Wahrtu Durwin/ un wiſſi Pra-
weescht fluddinaja winnu Pree-
fchâ tahs nahkainas Leetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Zedekijus Knaën
Dehls darrija few Dſelses Rag-
gus/ un fazzija: Ta fakka tas
KUNGS: Ar tcheim baddi-
tu tohs Sihretus/ teekams tu-
tohs buhsi nomaitajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wiſſi Praweeschi flud-
dinaja tahs nahkamas Leetas/ ta-
fazzidami: Zellees us Rahmotu-
eeſch Gileadas/ jums buhs lab-
ba Laime/ jo tas KUNGS dohe-
winnu ta Kehnina Rohkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Wehsnefis/ kas-
pehz Mikku bij gahjs/ runnaja
us to/ un fazzija: Raugi jelle-
tee Praweeschi runna ar weenu
Mutti labbu preeſch ta Kehni-
na/ lai jelle taws Wahrdg ta-
patt irr ka winnu Wahrdg/ un-
runna labbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Mikkus fazzija: Ti-
teeschaim ka tas KUNGS dsib-
wo/ ko tas KUNGS us man
fazzibs/ to gribbu es runnaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch preeſch to
Kehnizu nahze/ tad fazzija tas
Kehninsch us winnu: Mikkus/
buhs nuus us Rahmotu eeſch
Gileadas Karrâ eet? jeb buhs
nuus to pamest? un tas fazzi-
ja us winnu: Zellees/ un eſſi-
laimigs/ jo tas KUNGS dohs
winnu ta Kehnina Rohkâ.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
